name: launch
description: Launch a Chromium browser. Options: browser, profile, headless.

browser.description: chrome, edge, brave, arc, vivaldi, chromium, canary

name: navigate
description: Navigate to a URL. Auto-dismisses popups. Returns page brief.

name: read
description: Reader-mode text extraction. Strips nav/ads, returns clean text.

name: text
description: Full page text in reading order with numbered interactive refs.

name: dom
description: Compact DOM. Scripts/styles/SVGs stripped. Scope with selector.

name: axtree
description: Accessibility tree. Use interactive=true for actionable elements with ref numbers. diff=true for changes.

interactive.description: Show only interactive elements with ref numbers

diff.description: Show only changes since last snapshot

name: observe
description: Interactive elements as ready-to-use commands. Generates ref map.

name: find
description: Find element by natural language description.

query.description: Description of the element to find

name: resolve
description: Get link/form target URL without clicking. Returns href, action, src.

name: screenshot
description: Capture screenshot. Use ref/selector to crop. Prefer text tools first.

full.description: Capture entire scrollable page, not just the viewport

output.description: Save to this path instead of returning the image. Returns text confirmation only, no base64.

name: pdf
description: Save current page as PDF.

name: click
description: Click an element. Supports selector, coordinates, ref, --text. Modes: double, right, human.

mode.description: Click variant. Omit for normal click.

name: hover
description: Hover over an element.

name: focus
description: Focus an element without clicking.

name: clear
description: Clear an input or contenteditable.

name: type
description: Focus input and type text. Set human=true for bot-evasion typing.

human.description: Human-like typing with variable delays and occasional typos

name: fill
description: Fill multiple form fields. Pass fields as {selector: value} object.

fields.description: Map of CSS selector/ref -> value to type. Example: {"#email": "user@example.com", "#password": "secret"}

name: keyboard
description: Type at current caret position. Use for rich editors.

text.description: Text to type at current caret

name: paste
description: Paste text via ClipboardEvent.

name: clipboard
description: Write HTML/text to clipboard and paste via Cmd+V.

html.description:
HTML content to write to clipboard (e.g. '

Title

Body with bold

')

text.description: Plain text fallback. If omitted, defaults to the html value.

name: inserttext
description: Insert text at cursor via Input.insertText.

text.description: Text to insert at current cursor position

name: press
description: Press key or combo (Enter, Ctrl+A, Meta+C).

name: select
description: Select option(s) from a <select> element.

selector.description: CSS selector or ref number of the <select> element

name: upload
description: Upload file(s) to a file input.

selector.description: CSS selector or ref number of the file input

name: drag
description: Drag from one element to another.

from.description: CSS selector or ref number of the source element

to.description: CSS selector or ref number of the target element

name: scroll
description: Scroll page or element. Targets: up/down/top/bottom/selector.

target.description: Direction (up/down/top/bottom), CSS selector to scroll into view, or selector followed by direction

name: eval
description: Evaluate JavaScript expression.

name: dialog
description: Set handler for next dialog. Call BEFORE triggering action.

text.description: Text to enter for prompt dialogs

name: waitfor
description: Wait for element to appear (default 30s timeout).

name: waitfornav
description: Wait for navigation/readystate.

name: cookies
description: Manage cookies (get/set/delete/clear).

domain.description: Cookie domain (optional, defaults to current hostname)

name: console
description: Show or listen for console logs.

name: network
description: Capture XHR/fetch requests. Filters by URL substring.

name: block
description: Block resource types or URL patterns.

name: viewport
description: Set viewport. Presets: mobile, iphone, ipad, tablet, desktop.

preset_or_width.description: Preset name or width in pixels

height.description: Height in pixels (when using numeric width)

name: zoom
description: Zoom page (25-200%). Coordinate clicks auto-adjust.

name: frames
description: List frames/iframes.

name: frame
description: Switch to a frame (use 'main' to reset).

target.description: Frame ID, name, CSS selector, or 'main'

name: tabs
description: List tabs owned by this session.

name: tab
description: Switch to a session-owned tab by ID.

name: newtab
description: Open a new tab in this session.

url.description: URL to open in the new tab

name: close
description: Close current tab.

name: back
description: Go back in history.

name: forward
description: Go forward in history.

name: reload
description: Reload current page.

name: activate
description: Bring browser window to front (macOS).

name: minimize
description: Minimize browser window (macOS).

name: lock
description: Lock active tab for exclusive access.

name: unlock
description: Release tab lock.

name: download
description: Configure or list downloads.

name: search
description: Web search via real browser. Returns extracted results.

engine.description: Search engine: google (default), bing, duckduckgo, or a custom URL (query appended)

name: readurls
description: Read multiple URLs in parallel. Returns combined content.

name: feedback
description: Send product feedback (1-5 rating). IMPORTANT: Do not include any names, usernames, emails, API keys, URLs with credentials, or other details that could identify the sender. Feedback is anonymous and may be displayed publicly.

rating.description: Rating 1-5 (1=poor, 5=excellent). Did sidekar help you complete browser tasks reliably?

comment.description: Focus on improvements only. Which tools failed or behaved unexpectedly (tool names, errors, selectors that didn't match)? What workarounds did you use? What features or fixes would have made the task easier? Do not recap what you did or list what worked. Do not include any names, usernames, emails, file paths, API keys, or other identifying information.

name: config
description: Get or set sidekar configuration.

action.description: get: show config, set: update a key

key.description: Config key to set (telemetry or feedback)

name: media
description: Emulate media features (dark mode, print, reduce-motion).

name: animations
description: Pause or resume page animations.

action.description: pause: freeze all animations, resume: restore normal playback, slow: 10% speed

name: security
description: Control certificate validation (ignore-certs/strict).

action.description: ignore-certs: accept self-signed/invalid certificates, strict: restore normal certificate validation

name: storage
description: Manage localStorage/sessionStorage/cookies/cache.

action.description: get: list storage items, set: set a key, remove: delete a key, clear: clear storage

target.description: For clear: which storage to clear. 'everything' clears storage + cache + cookies + service workers.

session.description: If true, operate on sessionStorage instead of localStorage (for set/remove)

name: sw
description: Manage service workers (list/unregister/update).

action.description: list: show registered workers, unregister: remove all workers, update: trigger update check

name: kill
description: Kill custom profile browser session.

name: batch
description: Execute multiple actions sequentially in one call.

actions.description: Array of actions to execute. Each action has 'tool' (command name) and tool-specific fields (same as individual tool params). Optional per-action controls: 'wait' (ms), 'retries', 'retry_delay' (ms), and 'optional'.

tool.description: Command name (click, type, screenshot, press, navigate, waitfor, etc.)

wait.description: Wait this many ms after this action (overrides smart default)

retries.description: Retry this action this many additional times if it fails

retry_delay.description: Wait this many ms between retry attempts

optional.description: If true, a failed action is recorded but does not abort the batch

delay.description: Global delay in ms between every action (additive with smart waits). Default: 0

name: tools
description: List all available tools organized by category.

name: grid
description: Overlay coordinate grid for canvas/image targeting.

spec.description: Grid spec: '8x6' (cols x rows), '50' (pixel cell size), 'off' (remove), or omit for default 10x10

name: install
description: Register MCP with detected clients.

name: monitor
description: Watch tabs for title/favicon changes. Requires tmux.

action.description: start: begin monitoring tabs. stop: stop monitoring. status: show monitor state.

tabs.description: Tab IDs to watch (comma-separated numbers from `tabs` command), or "all" to watch all owned tabs. Required for start.

name: who
description: List agents on your channel. all=true for cross-session discovery.

all.description: If true, discover agents across all tmux sessions via IPC sockets (not just current channel)

name: bus_send
description: Send a message to another agent on the bus. @all to broadcast.

to.description: Agent name to message, or "@all" to broadcast

kind.description: Message type: 'request' expects a response, 'response' answers a prior request, 'fyi' is informational (default: fyi)

reply_to.description: Message ID being replied to (from a prior request/handoff). Resolves the pending request.

name: bus_done
description: Hand off to another agent with summary and next request.

next.description: Agent name to hand off to, or "@all" to broadcast

request.description: What you need the next agent to do

reply_to.description: Message ID being replied to (from a prior request). Resolves the pending request.

name: register
description: Register on the agent bus (auto-called on MCP startup).

name.description: Custom name to register as (optional — auto-generated if omitted)

name: unregister
description: Leave the agent bus.

name: desktop_screenshot
description: Capture desktop or app window screenshot.

app.description: App name to capture (case-insensitive substring match, e.g. 'Safari', 'Finder')

pid.description: Process ID of the app to capture (alternative to app name)

output.description: File path to save the screenshot (default: auto-generated temp path)

name: desktop_apps
description: List running applications with PID and bundle ID.

name: desktop_windows
description: List windows for an app.

name: desktop_find
description: Search app UI elements by query string.

query.description: Search query — matches against element role, title, value, and identifier

name: desktop_click
description: Click a UI element by query via Accessibility API.

query.description: Search query to find the element to click

name: desktop_launch
description: Launch an app by name.

name: desktop_activate
description: Bring an app to the foreground.

name: desktop_quit
description: Quit an app gracefully.
